issue_title: fix(dashboard): show skeleton loader while access tokens load
issue_body_preview:
### Background

Resolves #7040. Closes https://github.com/graphql-hive/console/pull/7905. The access tokens settings page shows nothing while the token list is loading, which can be confusing on slow connections.

### Description

Added skeleton placeholders to `AccessTokensSubPage` that displ
test_description_zh: 打开访问令牌（Access Tokens）设置页面，在令牌列表数据加载过程中观察页面的加载状态展示效果。
expected_result_zh: 在令牌列表数据加载期间，页面应显示骨架屏（skeleton loader）占位符，而不是显示空白/无内容状态，加载完成后骨架屏消失并正确展示令牌列表。
